sidecarUrl.description: Emergency override. Pidfile at ~/.openclaw/sidecar.pid wins when present — this value is ONLY used when the pidfile is missing/malformed. Set only for non-standard topologies (e.g. remote testing). MUST track sidecar/config.py:api_port default if used.

accountId.description: Feishu account ID to intercept (only messages from this account)
